basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 28 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age Relaxation to reserved categories will be given as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/DNB or equivalent in concerned speciality from a government recognized University/Institution
qualification.details: PG Degree/DNB or equivalent in concerned speciality from a government recognized University/Institution.

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: PG Degree/DNB or equivalent in concerned speciality from a government recognized University/Institution

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ESIC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PG Degree/DNB or equivalent in concerned speciality from a government recognized University/Institution.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age Relaxation to reserved categories will be given as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 09th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree/DNB or its equivalent in the concerned speciality from a government-recognized University/Institution to be eligible for the Senior Resident positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident posts in ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 28 vacancies for the Senior Resident posts across various specialities. The detailed distribution of vacancies is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,48,669/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to the ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-. There is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ESIC Senior Resident posts will primarily involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Resident posts announced by ESIC are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. The exact venue address will be mentioned in the official notification PDF.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents required are detailed in the official notification.
